title: Clinical Trials
subtitle: Advancing patient care through clinical research partnerships
partnershipTitle: Clinical Trials Partnership Between CCPSA & Avacare Research
partnershipText: CCPSA has partnered with Avacare Research to offer eligible patients the opportunity to participate in clinical trials. A clinical trial is a carefully designed research study that investigates the effectiveness of a specific treatment for a particular group of people. Well-designed clinical trials are the fastest way to find new, effective treatments.
monitoringText: Trial participants are closely monitored by knowledgeable, experienced CCPSA physicians and healthcare professionals, including clinical research coordinators.
partnerUrlLabel: Visit the Avacare Research website to learn more
enrollingTitle: Clinical Trials are enrolling for the following:

enrollingTrials.title: Vaccinations
enrollingTrials.description: Including influenza and respiratory syncytial virus (RSV)

enrollingTrials.title: Asthma
enrollingTrials.description: Clinical trials for asthma treatment and management

enrollingTrials.title: Interstitial Lung Disease (ILD)
enrollingTrials.description: Trials investigating treatments for interstitial lung disease

enrollingTrials.title: Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis (IPF)
enrollingTrials.description: Studies for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis treatments

enrollingTrials.title: Pulmonary Hypertension
enrollingTrials.description: Clinical trials for pulmonary hypertension management

enrollingTrials.title: Chronic Cough
enrollingTrials.description: Research studies for chronic cough treatment

enrollingNote: More clinical trials are being added regularly. If you are interested in participating in research and would like the most current list of open trials, please contact our clinical research team.
contactText: To learn more about or participate in available clinical trials at CCPSA, contact:
ctaText: Contact us today with any questions you might have about clinical trial participation.
